criteria: The preview proves one explicit component behavior with realistic deterministic fixture data.
The host has stable responsive geometry and declares required providers, styles, assets, and capabilities.
Catalogue and detail interaction contracts are separated without nested interactive elements.
Lazy loading, unsupported capabilities, and thrown errors stay local to one preview.
Verification covers nonblank rendering, inputs, reduced motion, geometry, remounting, and cleanup.
The implementation uses the real component API and avoids a divergent preview-only fork.

failure_recovery_case.prompt: Create a preview for a component whose required licensed image asset is not available in the repository.
failure_recovery_case.expected: Do not copy or hotlink an unreviewed asset. Use an owned neutral fixture only if it preserves the behavior being demonstrated, otherwise implement a bounded unavailable state and request the approved asset.
